name: Applesauce-Raisin Doughnuts-Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine applesauce, raisins, sugar, nutmeg, cinnamon, vanilla, and egg. Mix until thoroughly blended.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, mixing until a dough forms. Knead on well-floured surface about 10 times or until smooth.
3. Roll or pat dough to about 1/2 inch thickness.
4. Cut into rings using floured doughnut cutter.
5. Fry 3-4 rings at a time in hot shortening, turning as soon as they rise to the surface and continuing to turn until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Shake with mixture of 1/2 cup sugar and 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg.
8. Yield: 12 doughnuts, 2-1/2 inch in diameter.
